name: documents_v2
notes: The UPDATE replaces the entire tags TEXT[] column with the client-supplied array; there is no additive merge — whatever the client sends becomes the authoritative tag set.

documents_v2 is the write target for tag saves; documents (the original table) is not touched. The AFTER INSERT trigger on documents (migration 003) syncs new uploads to documents_v2 but deliberately omits the tags column, meaning tags can diverge between the two tables.
